## Purpose
This file specifies patterns for files and directories that should be ignored by version control systems, particularly for the DiffDoc project.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users will observe that files and directories matching the specified patterns are excluded from version control operations, preventing them from being tracked or committed.

## Business Rules
Files and directories that match the defined patterns will not be included in version control. This includes version control artifacts, dependencies, build outputs, logs, environment files, and various binary assets.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
No data inputs are processed by this file. The output is the configuration for ignored files and directories for version control.

## Side Effects
None identified.

## Error And Edge Cases
None identified.

## Dependencies
None identified.

## Operational Notes
This file should be maintained to reflect any changes in the project's structure or dependencies to ensure that unnecessary files are consistently ignored by version control.
